title: Stacks, Queues, Deques, and Monotonic Structures · Invariant Lens: Monotonic Deque
summary: Coordinate undo history, request scheduling, and sliding-window alerts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa monotonic deque increment in a suite of bounded linear abstract data types. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain a monotonic deque invariant for window extrema without stale entries.
Apply FIFO ordering with bounded capacity and explicit overload behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
